Build-Depends: debhelper-compat (= 13), dh-sequence-golang, golang-any, golang-github-cespare-xxhash-dev, golang-github-cncf-xds-dev, golang-github-envoyproxy-go-control-plane-dev, golang-github-google-go-cmp-dev, golang-github-google-uuid-dev, golang-github-spiffe-go-spiffe-dev, golang-glog-dev, golang-golang-x-net-dev, golang-golang-x-sync-dev, golang-golang-x-sys-dev, golang-gonum-v1-gonum-dev, golang-google-genproto-dev (>= 0.0~git20210726.e7812ac-4), golang-google-protobuf-dev, golang-opentelemetry-contrib-dev, golang-opentelemetry-otel-dev, protobuf-compiler (>= 3.11.4~), protoc-gen-go
Package-List: golang-google-grpc-dev deb golang optional arch=all protoc-gen-go-grpc deb golang optional arch=any
